name: Cherry Pineapple Kugel
recipeIngredient: 20 oz. crushed pineapple in juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 X13 baking dish.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine melted margarine with cooked noodles; toss well to coat.
4. Add eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, and pineapple; mix well.
5. Pour half of the noodle mixture into prepared dish.
6. Spread with cherry pie filling or apricot preserves.
7. Cover with remaining noodle mixture.
8. Lightly crush corn flakes and combine with sugar and cinnamon.
9. Sprinkle topping over kugel.
10. Dot with margarine.
11. Bake for 40 minutes or until golden.
